{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Emperors
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Eithan]] claims his machinations make emperors tremble.<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c8">''Reaper'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
[[Category:Titles]]
